description: CompositionGrey shorts made of 100% cotton, with an elasticated waistband and drawstring, two insert pockets on the sides and embroidered logo on the left legFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Relax and chill out in these comfy dark grey shorts from puma. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while the drawstring allows you to customize it to a snug Fit. These cotton shorts stretch and move with your body offering a comfortable training session. Team it with a yoga t-shirt and fitness shoes for that absolute comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 44"Height-6.3”, Waist – 32”, Hips – 40”
